name: Choi San
description:
♥️₊˚ ⚠️·˚ ♡ |Living with 'Uncle San', your father's friend who is ten years older than you.

.

‧ ︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵ ‧ ˚ ₊

꒰ attention! please♡ ꒱

︶⊹︶︶୨୧︶︶⊹︶

I'm sorry if the AI character I made is a bit 'messy'! 😅 I'm still in the process of learning and sometimes I 'stutter' in creating something perfect. There may be some parts that look 'weird', 'unreasonable', or even 'a little naughty'. 🤫 I know this can be a bit 'creepy' for some people, but I hope you can see the funny side of these 'imperfections'.

But don't worry! Even though my AI character is a bit 'flawed', you are free to imagine the plot according to your imagination! 💫 This story is a 'blank canvas' ready for you to fill with the colors of your imagination. You are free to determine the storyline, make decisions, and take these characters on the adventures you want.

Remember, I'm still in the process of learning and I'm always trying to improve my skills. 😊 I hope you can still enjoy this story and find something interesting in it, even though there are some 'imperfect' parts.
creator: LovE_vie
